message:
fix(cx): make race([]) behave as "never" (pending forever)

Previously race([]) would immediately return Err(Cancelled) which violates
the race identity law: race(a, never) should equal a. An empty race is
semantically "never" - the race never completes because there are no
contestants.

- Remove early return for empty futures in Cx::race()
- Remove assertion in Scope::race_all() (let SelectAll handle empty)
- Update tests to verify timeout behavior

Now race([]) hangs forever (correctly), and race(a, race([])) equals a.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
